title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.541 - Cancellation of registration — authority of secretary to accept service of process
text:
359.541.  Cancellation of registration — authority of secretary to accept service of process. — A foreign limited partnership may cancel its registration by filing with the secretary of state a certificate of cancellation signed * by a general partner.  A cancellation does not terminate the authority of the secretary of state to accept service of process on the foreign limited partnership with respect to causes of action arising out of the transaction of business in this state.
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650, A.L. 2004 H.B. 1664) 
*Word "to" appears in original rolls.
